page_content:
Qualiﬁed transfer students are admitted to the BSIS at Shady Grove program as a cohort group. Students complete their degree over four consecutive semesters as full-time students, taking ﬁve 3-credit courses per semester, and graduate with a Bachelor of Science in Information Science degree. The BSIS program at Shady Grove is a cohort program with a pre-set class schedule to ensure admitted students are able to complete their degree in four consecutive semesters.

The BSIS at Shady Grove program offers outstanding nationally recognized faculty, uniquely qualiﬁed for excelled learning classrooms, academic support, valuable ﬁnancial resources, career advising, and various student engagement and leadership opportunities.

Information Science Major at Shady Grove

Restriction: Students are not permitted to double-major or double-degree with the Bachelor of Arts in Technology and Information Design.

Admission Requirements Please note that admission into the BSIS at Shady Grove program is during the fall semesters only.

To be considered for admission to the BSIS program at Shady Grove, applicants must complete the following admission requirements:
